notes: Editor + site polish from the testing meeting. Links: the properties panel now has an 'Open in a new tab' checkbox for any link (sets target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer) and clears it cleanly when unchecked. Anchors: every element (especially sections and columns) now has an editable 'Anchor ID' field, so you can link to a spot on the page with #id — the id is sanitized to a valid anchor as you type, and the panel shows the exact #link to use. Favicon: Design → Design now has a Favicon uploader (square PNG/SVG/ICO) with a live preview; 'Apply to all pages' injects a managed <link rel=icon> (+ apple-touch-icon) into every page and Remove clears it. Per-page heading styles: Page Settings now has H1/H2/H3 overrides (size, weight, alignment, color) that compile to scoped, !important CSS injected only into that page on Save, so a page can override the site design without touching global styles. Go Live tool: Settings now has a 'Find & Replace URL' card (Architect only) to swap a staging/preview domain for the production domain across all pages, posts, sitemap.xml and robots.txt — with a non-destructive Preview (per-file occurrence counts) before applying, and it also fixes the website URL in site.json. Renamed the last visible 'SITE FACTORY' label to 'SITE FOUNDRY'. Previous (1.9.0) — Page management: each page in the editor now has a gear → Page Settings (Custom Page CSS + Custom Page JavaScript injected into that page only on save, Draft toggle that noindexes + drops the page from the sitemap, Delete page, and Remove-from-CMS). Targeted-landing pages now show a red dot in the page list. Fixed Remove-from-CMS not sticking (the hidden-page match now checks path OR file OR id). Polish: the SEO Generate buttons now read 'Generate' / 'Generate All' (dropped 'with AI') with a clean Font Awesome icon instead of the sparkle emoji — no emojis in the UI. Renamed the Site Factory module to Site Foundry throughout. SEO module rebuilt (Rank Math-style): AI generation now reads each page's REAL content (fixes the 'Page Not Found' metadata bug where it read empty CMS blocks on scanned pages) and writes context-aware, business/location-specific titles + descriptions. Per-page SEO now includes focus keyword with a live on-page analysis checklist + score, canonical URL, robots index/noindex + follow/nofollow, Open Graph + Twitter card fields, a Google snippet preview, and a per-page schema type. New 'Apply to all pages' writes managed meta tags + JSON-LD (site-wide LocalBusiness/Organization + per-page schema) into every page file and regenerates sitemap.xml + robots.txt. Sitemap generator and robots.txt editor added. (Redirections + a 404 monitor are the next SEO addition.) Also fixed the editor toolbar: the Visual/Code toggle is centered and the device buttons no longer break when returning from Code view. Code editor for the page editor: a Visual ⇄ Code toggle in the editor toolbar opens a VS Code-style source view (CodeMirror, syntax-highlighted HTML + inline CSS/JS, dark theme, line numbers, auto-close tags, Ctrl/Cmd+S to save). Switching back to Visual ingests any hand-edits so they stay editable visually; saving in Code mode writes the source directly. Fixed a media-gallery bug where, on a filtered view (e.g. Videos), clicking a tile opened/copied the item at that slot in the unfiltered 'All' list instead of the one you clicked. Editor preview now fills the canvas: the desktop preview is the largest 16:9 box that fits (rendering at a real desktop width — at least 1440, larger on big monitors) plus a Fill-screen button (native fullscreen). Fixed self profile editing — the signed-in user's id and email are now stored in the session so the Account modal populates and saves (was 'Please sign in again'). Added custom code injection points in Analytics: Functional/Analytics/Marketing each with a header and a body field, injected into <head> and before </body> via the existing Apply-to-All-Pages sweep. Account/Settings cleanup: removed the Updates card and the Mailgun card from Settings (Mailgun is now configured server-side in config.secret.php so the API key never passes through the browser); removed the top-right notification bell; the top-right avatar is now a profile menu (Account / Change password / Sign out) and the change-password + sign-out buttons moved out of the bottom-left into it; signed-in users can now edit their own profile (name + email) via the new Account modal. ADAptify panel isolation fix: the widget is now appended to <html> (a sibling of <body>) and every visitor effect is scoped to <body>, so the panel itself can never be recolored, filtered, zoomed, or resized by the page — verified the menu stays readable under High Contrast/Invert. ADAptify full option set: the widget now offers Readable Font, Highlight Titles/Links, Text Magnifier, Content Scaling + Font Size + Line Height + Letter Spacing steppers (±10% per click), text alignment, Dark/Light/High contrast, Monochrome, Invert, High/Low saturation, custom text/title/background colors, Mute Sounds, Hide Images, Reading Guide, Reading Mask, Stop Animations, Highlight on Hover/Click, and Large Cursor — grouped into Content/Color/Navigation sections, all persisted per visitor. Updates are now ALWAYS automatic: the manual update card is removed and every site installs the latest engine at login, so no one can run a stale build (re-introduce a gate before a major release if needed). Security: enforce HTTPS for credentials. A new root .htaccess redirects all HTTP traffic to HTTPS site-wide (proxy-aware to avoid redirect loops), and api.php now refuses sign-in / password / secret actions over plain HTTP as a server-side backstop (localhost exempt; toggle with 'require_https' in config.secret.php). Passwords were already hashed at rest with Argon2id/bcrypt; this closes the in-transit gap. Hotfix (1.4.1): neutralized a literal closing-script sequence in an ADAptify comment that truncated admin/index.html and broke login. ADAptify — a site-wide accessibility widget (contrast, text size, grayscale, invert, readable font, highlight links, big cursor, pause motion) with its own CMS tab. Enable/disable, placement, and brand colors are stored server-side in data/adaptify.json and apply to every page instantly. One-click install drops the widget script across all pages. Plus the 1.3.0 work: server-level page list, automatic server connection, server-side settings, Revisions ledger, faithful HTML import, WAF-proof multipart save, square media picker + 16:9 desktop editor, FAQ/accordion editing, and Privacy Policy generator.
apiNote: admin/api.php holds this site's secrets (API token) and is never auto-updated. If a release changes api.php, update it by hand. 1.4.2 adds HTTPS enforcement to api.php (the credential-action backstop) — deploy the updated api.php and the new root .htaccess by hand to get the full effect; the redirect and guard only protect a site once those two files are in place. 1.4.0 adds 'adaptify.js' to api.php's repo-fetch allow-list — only needed for installing the widget from a PRIVATE repo.
